_comment: Fuzzy-hash signatures of CONFIRMED malicious samples. Copy this file to ~/RansomwareScanner/data/fuzzy_signatures.json (or set CONFIG['fuzzy_signature_db']) and populate it. Generate entries with:  python RansomwareScanner.py --fuzzy-hash /path/to/known_sample  then paste the printed tlsh/ssdeep here with a family label. NEVER store live malware in this repo - only its fuzzy hashes. The example below is a harmless placeholder so the format is clear; it will not match real files.

signatures.note: Placeholder only - replace with real signatures.
